# MudKeyboard

> MudKeyboard is a free, open-source on-screen virtual keyboard library for Blazor and MudBlazor apps. The keyboard core is 100% C#/Blazor (no JavaScript); a single optional JS shim powers one feature — a global docked keyboard that pops up when any input is focused. It is themed automatically by MudBlazor (dark/light follows your theme), and is AOT- and trim-friendly. Targets .NET 8, 9 and 10 (interactive Server and WebAssembly; no static SSR).

Install from NuGet as `MudKeyboard` (MudBlazor is a peer dependency). Replace https://YOUR-DOMAIN with this site's deployed origin.

## Components
- MudKeyboard: full QWERTY keyboard with shift/caps and a 123 toggle to a numbers/symbols face; two-way `@bind-Value`, `OnEnter`, `MaxLength`, `DropShadow`, `Palette`. [Docs](https://YOUR-DOMAIN/components/keyboard)
- MudNumpad: calculator-style numeric pad with optional `AllowDecimal`. [Docs](https://YOUR-DOMAIN/components/numpad)
- MudPricepad: pence-first money entry (type 5·2·3 → £5.23) with `CurrencySymbol` and `DecimalPlaces`. [Docs](https://YOUR-DOMAIN/components/pricepad)
- MudKeyboardHost: global docked keyboard that slides up on input focus and types at the caret; register with `AddMudKeyboard()`. [Docs](https://YOUR-DOMAIN/components/docked-keyboard)

## Guides
- Getting started (install, MudBlazor setup, render modes): [Docs](https://YOUR-DOMAIN/getting-started)
- Layouts & key tokens (built-in layouts, `{bksp}`/`{enter}`/`{shift}`/`{sym}` tokens): [Docs](https://YOUR-DOMAIN/features/layouts)
- Custom layouts (a `KeyboardLayout` is just rows of key tokens): [Docs](https://YOUR-DOMAIN/features/custom-layouts)
- Theming & palette (inherit the MudBlazor theme or override with `KeyboardPalette`): [Docs](https://YOUR-DOMAIN/features/theming)
- Emit mode (`OnInput` routes each press elsewhere instead of editing `Value`): [Docs](https://YOUR-DOMAIN/features/emit-mode)
- AOT & trimming (`IsAotCompatible`, reflection-free, primitive-only interop): [Docs](https://YOUR-DOMAIN/features/aot)

## Tools
- Playground (tweak parameters live and copy the generated markup): [Docs](https://YOUR-DOMAIN/playground)
- API reference (every public type: components, models, services, layouts): [Docs](https://YOUR-DOMAIN/api)

## Package & source
- NuGet package: https://www.nuget.org/packages/MudKeyboard
- Source code (GitHub, MIT licensed): https://github.com/sardar97/mudkeyboard
- MudBlazor (peer dependency): https://mudblazor.com
